dialogue_title: Learn Dutch: New Student in Class

conversation.text: Goedemorgen. Jij bent een nieuwe leerling, toch?
conversation.translation: Good morning. You are a new student, right?

conversation.text: Ja, dat klopt. Goedemorgen.
conversation.translation: Yes, that's correct. Good morning.

conversation.text: Welkom in de klas. Hoe heet je?
conversation.translation: Welcome to the class. What is your name?

conversation.text: Ik heet Amir.
conversation.translation: My name is Amir.

conversation.text: Aangenaam Amir. Waar kom je vandaan?
conversation.translation: Nice to meet you Amir. Where do you come from?

conversation.text: Ik kom uit Duitsland.
conversation.translation: I come from Germany.

conversation.text: Spreek je al Nederlands?
conversation.translation: Do you speak Dutch already?

conversation.text: Een beetje. Ik leer nog.
conversation.translation: A little bit. I'm still learning.

conversation.text: Dat is geen probleem. We helpen je hier.
conversation.translation: That's no problem. We will help you here.

conversation.text: Dank u wel.
conversation.translation: Thank you very much.

conversation.text: Hoe lang leer je al Nederlands?
conversation.translation: How long have you been learning Dutch?

conversation.text: Ongeveer zes maanden.
conversation.translation: About six months.

conversation.text: Mooi. Begrijp je wat ik nu zeg?
conversation.translation: Nice. Do you understand what I'm saying now?

conversation.text: Ja, meestal wel, maar soms is het moeilijk.
conversation.translation: Yes, mostly, but sometimes it is difficult.

conversation.text: Dat is normaal. Stel gerust vragen.
conversation.translation: That's normal. Feel free to ask questions.

conversation.text: Dat zal ik doen.
conversation.translation: I will do that.

conversation.text: Heb je al vrienden in de klas?
conversation.translation: Do you have friends in the class already?

conversation.text: Nog niet, maar ik hoop het snel.
conversation.translation: Not yet, but I hope so soon.

conversation.text: Dat komt goed. Ga gerust naast Emma zitten.
conversation.translation: That will be fine. Feel free to go sit next to Emma.

conversation.text: Oké, dank u wel.
conversation.translation: Okay, thank you very much.

conversation.text: Heb je je boeken bij je?
conversation.translation: Do you have your books with you?

conversation.text: Ja, alles is in mijn tas.
conversation.translation: Yes, everything is in my bag.

conversation.text: Prima, we beginnen met de les.
conversation.translation: Great, we will start with the lesson.

conversation.text: Ik ben er klaar voor.
conversation.translation: I am ready for it.
